_comment: Chromium enterprise policy for the FR kiosk. Pre-grants camera access to the local kiosk origin so the getUserMedia permission prompt never appears (incognito forgets grants on every exit). Install into BOTH possible policy dirs — the package name varies by Pi OS release: sudo mkdir -p /etc/chromium/policies/managed /etc/chromium-browser/policies/managed && sudo cp deploy/chromium-kiosk-policy.json /etc/chromium/policies/managed/fr-kiosk.json && sudo cp deploy/chromium-kiosk-policy.json /etc/chromium-browser/policies/managed/fr-kiosk.json
